name: Five Spice Game Hens (Siu Yeah Gai)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and clean the game hens.
2. Pat them dry and rub the cavities with the five spice powder.
3. Mix together hoisin sauce, bean sauce, sherry, and plum sauce.
4. Rub the remaining sauce mixture plus salt into the game hens.
5. Let stand overnight.
6. Mix dark soy sauce and maple syrup separately.
Cooking:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Rub the skin of the game hens with the soy sauce and syrup mixture.
3. Roast the back side up for 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Turn the breast side up and roast for another 20 to 25 minutes, or until the skins turn golden brown.
Do-ahead notes: Prepare through step 4 in advance.
Comments: Use the same recipe for roast chicken. Seven spice rice or fried rice are good accompaniments.
Makes 4 servings.
